features: The information below applies to each unit in the pack
Clean and clear morning energy skin energising daily facial scrub, with bursting beads and vitamin c and ginseng
Exfoliating formula removes dirt, oil and impurities
description: Ingredients [PR-009057], Aqua, Glycerin, Sodium Laureth Sulfate, Polyethylene, Lauryl Glucoside, Acrylates/C10-30 Alkyl Acrylate Crosspolymer, Cucumis Sativus Extract, Zingiber Officinale Extract, Panax Ginseng Extract, Citrus Grandis Fruit Extract, Menthyl Lactate, Lactose, Cera Microcristallina, Talc, Polysorbate 20, Titanium Dioxide, Mica, Cellulose, Hydroxypropyl Methylcellulose, Acrylates/Ammonium Methacrylate Copolymer, Disodium EDTA, Sodium Hydroxide, Sodium Ascorbyl Phosphate, Triethyl Citrate, Tocopheryl Acetate, Phenoxyethanol, Methylparaben, Parfum, CI 19140, CI 77491, CI 77492, CI 73360 Directions Directions: Apply to wet face and gently massage all over face avoiding eye area. Rinse thoroughly. Safety Warning Caution: for external use only. Avoid contact with eyes. In the event of contact - flush with water. Discontinue use if skin irritation develops. Keep out of reach of children. See more
